---
title: "\'Lifelong Friends\'"
---

## \'Lifelong Friends\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1894
**Genre:** Non-fiction, reminiscences
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (December 1894) 694-8

### Notes

Reprinted in Battiscombe and Laski, 181-4.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
